title: ‘4Ps’ updates to the CMA’s mergers guidance (CMA2) and mergers notice template
body: "We are consulting on changes to the CMA’s merger guidance on jurisdiction and procedure (CMA2) and to the mergers notice template.  The proposed changes are designed to embed the CMA’s new ‘4Ps’ framework – pace, predictability, process and proportionality – into our mergers processes. These updates are explained in the consultation document.  "
